description_long: This object is a compact, submachine gun-style firearm with a boxy, utilitarian design reminiscent of the MAC-10. The main body is constructed from matte black metal, featuring a rectangular receiver with minimal external ornamentation. It has a prominent pistol grip made of a darker, possibly polymer material, and a long, detachable magazine extending downward. The barrel is short and cylindrical, protruding slightly from the front, and the top of the receiver is fitted with simple iron sights. The overall appearance is robust and functional, suitable for close-quarters use in urban environments.
description: A compact, boxy black submachine gun with a short barrel, pistol grip, and extended magazine. The design is utilitarian, with iron sights and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rectangular receiver, pistol grip, trigger, and extended magazine; barrel and iron sights are visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, front sight, and the narrow profile of the receiver and magazine.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the ejection port, grip, trigger, and magazine; similar to view 0 but mirrored.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the receiver, rear sight, and the top of the grip.
